EASTERN MEDITERRANEAN SEA.
GUNNERY.
1. GUNNERY EXERCISES 120600Z TO 120900Z AND
   130730Z TO 131030Z APR IN AREAS BOUND BY:
   A. 34-25N 034-00E, 34-31N 034-10E,
      34-25N 034-20E, 34-00N 034-08E,
      34-10N 034-00E.
   B. 34-23N 034-24E, 34-15N 034-36E,
      34-00N 034-33E, 34-00N 034-14E.
2. CANCEL THIS MSG 131130Z APR.
